title: Caves and Cliffs Tweaks
description: Adding little details to the blocks added in 1.17, The Caves and Cliffs Update
body:
# Hello There
This small resource pack features small tweaks for blocks added in 1.17 and adds more detail to the world.
## Features
- 3D Amethyst (different from Vanilla Tweaks 3D pack)
- 3D Dripstone (also different)
- bushy azalea & flowering azalea plants
- bushy azalea & flowering azalea leaves
### Credit
Check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile!
